High Peak Marquee Tents for Sale

Commercial-grade high peak marquee tents available for purchase in Ontario. Two series to choose from — Value Series with solid white top, and Premium Clear Center Series with elegant clear roof panels. Perfect for event rental businesses, venues, caterers and frequent event hosts.

All tents are built for commercial use — heavy-duty frames, durable fabric and weather-resistant construction.
